title: Reforming Plant Flowsheets
caption: Parameter study for SMR, ATR, POX, and blue-H2 route builders.
description: The reforming study compares route-builder outputs as relative indices for methane conversion, oxygen demand, tube or burner duty, and syngas H2/CO readiness.
discussion: The route builders are not interchangeable black boxes. SMR, ATR, POX, and blue-SMR cases distribute energy and syngas quality differently. The study demonstrates why route comparison notebooks should report conversion, duty, syngas quality, and downstream purification assumptions together.
calculation_basis: Stoichiometric SMR/ATR/POX/WGS balances, equilibrium or route-builder sweeps, PSA recovery accounting, and CO2-capture mass-balance indices.
study_basis: IEA hydrogen route context plus process-design and gas-purification references set the screening ranges and interpretation limits.
source_labels: IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Chemical engineering design reference, Gas purification reference, GPSA engineering data reference

topic_examples.calculation: Compare ATR route-builder cases with oxygen-to-carbon and steam-to-carbon controls before downstream capture.
topic_examples.sweep: O2/C and S/C cases around the base ATR operating window.
topic_examples.kpis: Methane conversion, syngas H2/CO readiness, soot-risk index, oxygen demand, CO2 concentration index.
topic_examples.source_labels: IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Chemical engineering design reference, GPSA engineering data reference

topic_examples.topic: SMR versus ATR versus partial oxidation
topic_examples.calculation: Run SMRHydrogenPlantBuilder, ATRHydrogenPlantBuilder, and POXHydrogenPlantBuilder as matched route-screening cases.
topic_examples.sweep: Route type at equal methane feed with route-specific steam and oxygen assumptions.
topic_examples.kpis: Conversion index, duty index, H2/CO readiness, downstream purification burden.
topic_examples.source_labels: IEA Global Hydrogen Review 2023, Chemical engineering design reference, GPSA engineering data reference
